title: bromus ramosus subsp. benekenii
intro: Bromus ramosus subsp. benekenii, also known as Beneken's bent or Lesser brome, is a subspecies of the Bromus ramosus grass family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Bromus ramosus subsp. benekenii include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating urinary issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
